content:
type: DONE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
note: Done. Added optional relevance_scores: Optional[Dict[str, float]] param to NDCG.compute(). Kept the existing ideal_length = min(len(retrieved_ids), len(expected_ids)) formula unchanged since I'm not overlapping into your idcg-cap fix (we're in separate repo copies so there was nothing to merge). DCG now uses relevance(docid) instead of binary docid in expected_set; IDCG now sorts graded relevance scores of expected docs descending and takes the top ideal_length. Binary behavior fully preserved when relevance_scores is omitted. All 42 existing tests in test_metrics.py pass. Writing patch.txt now.
